⚡ Farm Brewery · Tap Room · Event Space

7 Hamlets
Brewing Co.

A locally owned farm brewery rooted in the history of Westmoreland, NY. Craft beer, live music, great food — come as you are.

Tap Room Hours View Menu

Wednesday4pm – 9pm
Thursday3pm – 9pm

Mon – TueClosed

Saturday12pm – ~8pm
Sunday1pm – ~5pm
What We Offer
More Than Just Beer

From small-batch craft brews named after Westmoreland's original hamlets to live music and a brand-new event space — there's always a reason to stop in.

🍻

Craft Beer

Small-batch brews inspired by the 7 original hamlets of Westmoreland. Brewed with passion since 2013.

🍔

Food & Kitchen

Fresh kitchen fare Wed–Sun plus the "Come and Get It" food truck for even more options.

🎵

Live Entertainment

Live music Thursdays & Sundays. Trivia Night every Wednesday. Always something going on.

🎉

Event Space

NEW private event space for parties. $250 for 3 hours of exclusive access. Full bar & catering available.

Weekly Lineup
Something Every Night
Wednesday

Trivia Night

6pm – 8pm · Tap room opens at 4pm

Thursday

Live Music

5:30pm – 8:30pm · Tap room opens at 3pm

Sunday

Live Music

2pm – 5pm · Tap room opens at 1pm
